## Summary

<!-- What does this PR do, and why? Link any related issue: "Closes #123" -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] New provider (`src/providers/`)
- [ ] New site adapter (`src/extraction/`)
- [ ] Docs / tooling
- [ ] Refactor (no behavior change)

## Checklist

- [ ] I ran `npm run format:check`, `npm run lint`, `npm run typecheck`, `npm test`, and `npm run build` locally and they pass.
- [ ] I added or updated tests (LLM responses are mocked — no real API calls in tests).
- [ ] Provider-specific code stays isolated in `src/providers/`; site selectors stay in the adapter's local config.
- [ ] The change respects the project philosophy: it analyzes claims, never recommends buying/avoiding, and never asserts a product is "fake".
- [ ] I updated docs (`README.md` / `CONTRIBUTING.md`) if behavior or setup changed.
